retrieved_result: How to React if Your Car's Brake Light Comes On 1 Check the parking brake (also called an emergency brake) and attempt to release it. The warning light will stay on continuously if this device is engaged.
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses automotive brake-light troubleshooting and is not related to IDEs or software development.
